title: Evvarikee Cheppodu
subTitle: Harathi, who hails from a conservative family, falls in love with Hari. The couple then come up with a plan to convince her father who does not approve of their relationship.

title: Chandralekha
subTitle: After Sitarama saves Chandra from an accident, her family mistakes him to be her husband while she lies in a coma. However, he continues the charade before her friend, Lekha, arrives on the scene.

title: Masthi Maja
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of some of the funniest comedy scenes from popular Telugu movies is played back to back.

title: Calvary Darsanam
subTitle: Calvary Darsanam

title: Mugguru Monagallu
subTitle: Trouble ensues when three unique individuals, each with a different disability, visit the police station and offer different clues to the murders.

title: Life Is Beautiful
subTitle: Srinu, a college student, relocates to Hyderabad and stays with his uncle. Later, he befriends diverse neighbours from different economic backgrounds.

title: Raja The Great
subTitle: Raja, a visually impaired young man, steps in to save Lucky from a gangster's deadly pursuit. Subsequently, touched by his unwavering courage and kindness, Lucky falls in love.

title: Om Bheem Bush
subTitle: Three scientists arrive at a village in search of a treasure. However, things take a turn when they explore a haunted palace and discover black magic.

title: Dragon
subTitle: After a harrowing break-up, a man becomes increasingly ambitious and begins committing fraud to gain more power.

title: DJ Tillu
subTitle: Bala Gangadhar Tilak, also known as DJ Tillu, is a young man who wishes to become a disc jockey someday. However, his life changes after he falls in love with Radhika.

title: Yenthavaadu Gaani
subTitle: An honest police officer works tirelessly to dismantle an organ trafficking racket. However, he is oblivious that the very man he hunts is his beloved's killer.

title: Shock
subTitle: Sekhar and Madhurima's happily married life is ruined when he's falsely accused of being Maoist by corrupt officials. However, Geeta, a journalist, tries to prove his innocence but to no avail.

title: Masthi Maja
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of some of the funniest comedy scenes from popular Telugu movies is played back to back.

title: Calvary Darsanam
subTitle: Calvary Darsanam

title: Jawaan
subTitle: Yellapragada Jai, an honest man, faces challenges when his childhood friend, Keshava, becomes a criminal. To protect his country, Jai puts everything on the line to thwart Keshava's perilous plans.

title: Extra Ordinary Man
subTitle: Abhinay, a struggling artist, meets the woman of his dreams and changes his aim. However, stumbling upon the chance to star in a movie, Abhinay's life takes a drastic turn.

title: Salaar
subTitle: Just when the prince of Khansaar is about to rise to the throne, a plan of overthrowing him is exercised and only one man can help him retrieve power.

title: Butterfly
subTitle: Geetha battles to rescue her sister's kidnapped children. In her desperate mission, she unearths disturbing truths about her seemingly ordinary neighbours.

title: Balagam
subTitle: A young man in severe debt believes that the only way to pay it off is through the dowry from his impending marriage. However, the death of his grandfather puts his plan on hold.

title: Singam
subTitle: A police officer takes part in undercover operations to expose the illegal activities happening in the region. However, he soon discovers an intricate criminal network.

title: Arjun Reddy
subTitle: Arjun Reddy Deshmukh, a young surgeon with functioning alcoholism and a furious temper, spirals into self-destruction when he learns that his girlfriend is marrying another man.

title: Aaha..!
subTitle: Sriram, a carefree guy, becomes a scapegoat and takes the blame on himself after he discovers a secret about his elder brother, Raghuram.

title: Masthi Maja
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of some of the funniest comedy scenes from popular Telugu movies is played back to back.

title: Calvary Darsanam
subTitle: Calvary Darsanam

title: Prince
subTitle: A teacher becomes smitten with his British colleague. However, their relationship is soon tested by unforeseen challenges.

title: Adhurs
subTitle: Twin brothers, separated at birth, grow up in vastly different environments. However, they are reunited when one gets kidnapped by gangsters.

title: Akhanda
subTitle: When the nefarious Varadarajulu plans to attack Murali Krishna, an ardent devotee of Lord Shiva, Akhanda leaves no stone unturned to defeat the evil.

title: Yevadu
subTitle: Satya gets a different face after he is almost killed, but a new face multiplies his problems. His ordeal begins when he leaves the hospital and has to deal with his lover's murderer.

title: Daaku Maharaaj
subTitle: A brave thief fights to survive and claim his territory. However, he battles powerful enemies, aiming to become a leader without a real kingdom.

title: Mirchi
subTitle: Manasa falls in love with Jai after he helps her and manages to win the hearts of her family with his good deeds. However, she is unaware that he belongs to a rival family.
